Issue: Potentially wrong device using_cuda variable status in monai/auto3dseg/analyzer.py
Decision: Set label_tensor device to image_tensor device only if both tensors use the same device
Rationale: The current implementation incorrectly sets using_cuda to True when label_tensor uses CUDA but image_tensor does not, leading to a mismatch where label_tensor is forced to CPU despite using_cuda being True
Author: benediktjohannes
Risk: Technical debt: Incorrect device handling may lead to runtime errors or unexpected behavior. Potential side effects include performance degradation or incorrect tensor operations due to device mismatch
